name: Refried Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Chilli powder (or more, or less, or none at all)
1 teaspoon Vecon liquid Vegetable stock (or similar)
2 medium Courgettes, halved and chopped lengthways
1 can Old El-Paso Refried beans (the ld free ones)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a saucepan with water and soften the garlic and onion.
2. Add chillies, cummin, and black pepper; fry until well combined.
3. Include mushrooms, peppers, vegetable stock, courgettes, and mixed herbs. Cook covered until courgettes soften.
4. Note that Vecon is "fat-free"; use a fat-free stock when shopping.
5. Stir in canned tomatoes and refried beans.
6. Mash the refried beans into the dish and cook covered until creamy.
7. Add sweetcorn (remove lid), adjusting with tomato puree for desired color and consistency, aiming for an Indian Korma-like texture.
8. Serve topped with soya yoghurt if desired.
